company.name: Argil
company.notes: AI clones/video. EU-friendly. French Y Combinator startup, based in Neuilly-sur-Seine, France. Founded 2023 by Laodis Menard + Brivael Le Pogam. ~50 employees, raised €4.9M from Seedcamp. NO public careers page — apply via LinkedIn (linkedin.com/company/argilai). Note: distinct from "Argilla" (data labeling, acquired by HF).
